title: Foo Bar Cross-System Reconciliation
description: Fix broken reconciliation between Postgres, Redpanda, and ClickHouse. Build a reconciliation job that detects and reports drift (missing rows, count mismatches).

tasks.description: Create reconciliation checks between source (Postgres), stream (Redpanda), and sink (ClickHouse)

infrastructure.description: Postgres app.transactions. Redpanda transactions topic. ClickHouse analytics.transactions. Data is drifted; reconciliation job missing.
